title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Canara Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Canara Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Canara Bank:
Canara Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
